scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/core && npm run test -w packages/vscode
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: npm run build && ./scripts/prepare-vsix.sh darwin-arm64 && cd packages/vscode/.vsix-stage && vsce package --target darwin-arm64 --out ../otel-log-beautifier-darwin-arm64-0.2.0.vsix
scripts.package:darwin-x64: npm run build && ./scripts/prepare-vsix.sh darwin-x64 && cd packages/vscode/.vsix-stage && vsce package --target darwin-x64 --out ../otel-log-beautifier-darwin-x64-0.2.0.vsix
scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run build && ./scripts/prepare-vsix.sh linux-x64 && cd packages/vscode/.vsix-stage && vsce package --target linux-x64 --out ../otel-log-beautifier-linux-x64-0.2.0.vsix
scripts.package:linux-arm64: npm run build && ./scripts/prepare-vsix.sh linux-arm64 && cd packages/vscode/.vsix-stage && vsce package --target linux-arm64 --out ../otel-log-beautifier-linux-arm64-0.2.0.vsix
scripts.package:win32-x64: npm run build && ./scripts/prepare-vsix.sh win32-x64 && cd packages/vscode/.vsix-stage && vsce package --target win32-x64 --out ../otel-log-beautifier-win32-x64-0.2.0.vsix
scripts.package:win32-arm64: npm run build && ./scripts/prepare-vsix.sh win32-arm64 && cd packages/vscode/.vsix-stage && vsce package --target win32-arm64 --out ../otel-log-beautifier-win32-arm64-0.2.0.vsix
scripts.package:all: npm run package:darwin-arm64 && npm run package:darwin-x64 && npm run package:linux-x64 && npm run package:linux-arm64 && npm run package:win32-x64 && npm run package:win32-arm64
scripts.postinstall: cd packages/vscode/node_modules && ln -sf ../../../node_modules/node-pty node-pty 2>/dev/null || true; chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null || true
